asset_name: Orb clear, cascade, and combo VFX
notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist. Deferred QA must check whether checkerboard is baked and whether real alpha cleanup is needed.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: board orb clear VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate transparent-style sprite sheet for match-3 orb clear, cascade, and combo feedback.
Subject: twelve small VFX sprites in a 4x3 sheet: fire burst, ice shards, earth leaves/rocks, heart heal sparkle, armor shield flash, gold coin sparkle, generic orb pop, combo ring, cascade streak, small impact star, dust puff, magic trail.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability, not too noisy.
Composition/framing: 4x3 sprite sheet, each effect centered with padding, transparent-background cutout feel, no labels.
Lighting/mood: energetic but board-readable.
Color palette: elemental colors plus gold and white highlights.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid huge opaque backgrounds.
